routing.notes: Text-like content with weak or no deterministic pattern

family_info.notes: Direct free-form text lane from free_text_log

records.evidence_text: At approximately 07:45, the ion implanter was brought online following overnight preventive maintenance.
Lot LOT_0045 was loaded at 08:10. The lot contains 25 wafers scheduled for phosphorus implantation
08:12 - Wafer 1 (WFR_0001) loaded into beam path. Pre-implant alignment completed within spec.
Beam current measured at 4.2 mA, within the acceptable range of 3.8 to 4.5 mA.
08:14 - Implant started on WFR_0001.
Dose rate stable at approximately 1.8e12 ions/cm2/s.
08:17 - Implant on WFR_0001 completed. Actual dose confirmed at 1.02e13 cm-2. Wafer unloaded.
Actual dose confirmed at 1.02e13 cm-2.
08:18 - Wafer 2 (WFR_0002) loaded. Pre-implant alignment OK.
08:20 - Implant started.
Beam current initially at 4.1 mA
dropped to 3.2 mA around 08:21
The system issued a beam current instability warning.
Operator adjusted suppression voltage
beam current recovered to 4.0 mA by 08:22
08:25 - Implant on WFR_0002 completed.
Final dose: 9.85e12 cm-2.
08:26 - Wafer 3 (WFR_0003) loaded.
Pre-implant alignment showed an offset of 0.4 mm in Y-axis
offset of 0.4 mm in Y-axis, which is above the 0.3 mm threshold
Operator re-ran alignment. Second attempt passed.
08:29 - Implant started on WFR_0003.
Pressure reading was 3.8e-5 Pa, exceeding the process limit of 2.0e-5 Pa.
Implant halted at approximately 40% completion. Estimated partial dose on WFR_0003 is approximately 4.0e12 cm-2.
Found the gate valve partially obstructed.
08:40 - Vacuum recovered to 1.4e-5 Pa.
System resumed standby state.
Wafer will be sent for metrology review.
Lot LOT_0045 processing paused pending engineering disposition.
quarantine WFR_0003, continue processing remaining wafers. Processing resumed.
09:02 - Wafer 4 (WFR_0004) loaded. All pre-checks passed.
09:04 - Implant started.
Beam current stable at 4.2 mA throughout run.
09:08 - Implant on WFR_0004 completed. ... Wafer accepted.
Dose confirmed at 1.01e13 cm-2.
Processing continued normally through WFR_0025.
Wafers quarantined: 1 (WFR_0003, partial dose)
Wafers rejected: 1 (WFR_0002 marginal, held for review)
At approximately 07:45, the ion implanter was brought online following overnight preventive maintenance.
The operator ran a standard chamber conditioning cycle before loading the first lot.
Lot LOT_0045 was loaded at 08:10. The lot contains 25 wafers scheduled for phosphorus implantation
phosphorus implantation at 40 keV with a dose of 1e13 cm-2. Recipe used is IMP_RCP_PHOS_40K.
08:12 - Wafer 1 (WFR_0001) loaded into beam path. Pre-implant alignment completed within spec.
Beam current measured at 4.2 mA, within the acceptable range of 3.8 to 4.5 mA.
08:14 - Implant started on WFR_0001.
Dose rate stable at approximately 1.8e12 ions/cm2/s.
08:17 - Implant on WFR_0001 completed. Actual dose confirmed at 1.02e13 cm-2. Wafer unloaded.
Actual dose confirmed at 1.02e13 cm-2.
08:18 - Wafer 2 (WFR_0002) loaded. Pre-implant alignment OK.
08:20 - Implant started.
Beam current initially at 4.1 mA
dropped to 3.2 mA around 08:21
The system issued a beam current instability warning.
Operator adjusted suppression voltage
beam current recovered to 4.0 mA by 08:22
08:25 - Implant on WFR_0002 completed.
Final dose: 9.85e12 cm-2.
Wafer accepted.
08:26 - Wafer 3 (WFR_0003) loaded.
Pre-implant alignment showed an offset of 0.4 mm in Y-axis
offset of 0.4 mm in Y-axis, which is above the 0.3 mm threshold
Operator re-ran alignment. Second attempt passed.
08:29 - Implant started on WFR_0003.
FAULT: High vacuum pressure spike detected in the end-station. Beam was automatically cut off.

data.fault_description: High vacuum pressure spike detected in the end-station

records.evidence_text: Pressure reading was 3.8e-5 Pa, exceeding the process limit of 2.0e-5 Pa.
Implant halted at approximately 40% completion. Estimated partial dose on WFR_0003 is approximately 4.0e12 cm-2.
08:33 - Operator initiated vacuum recovery procedure. Chamber was isolated and turbo pump speed checked.
Found the gate valve partially obstructed.
Valve was manually cycled.
08:40 - Vacuum recovered to 1.4e-5 Pa.
System resumed standby state.
WFR_0003 quarantined for dose non-conformance.
Wafer will be sent for metrology review.
Lot LOT_0045 processing paused pending engineering disposition.
quarantine WFR_0003, continue processing remaining wafers. Processing resumed.
09:02 - Wafer 4 (WFR_0004) loaded. All pre-checks passed.
09:04 - Implant started.
Beam current stable at 4.2 mA throughout run.
09:08 - Implant on WFR_0004 completed. ... Wafer accepted.
Dose confirmed at 1.01e13 cm-2.

Final summary: - Total wafers processed: 25 - Wafers accepted: 23 - Wafers quarantined: 1 (WFR_0003, partial dose) - Wafers rejected: 1 (WFR_0002 marginal, held for review) - Total process time: approx. 4 hours 20 minutes
Processing continued normally through WFR_0025.
Wafers quarantined: 1 (WFR_0003, partial dose)
Wafers rejected: 1 (WFR_0002 marginal, held for review)
No additional alarms after 08:40
